vision.statement: Sovereign deploy substrate — EKS/staging, SECAS, fleet health, observability

mission: Sovereign deploy substrate — EKS/staging, SecOps, fleet health, observability

productGoals.title: Fleet security clearance
productGoals.outcome: SecOps and ComplianceOps can promote fleet infrastructure with clear evidence and no hidden gating ambiguity
productGoals.measure: SecOps internal Class R sealed and ComplianceOps fleet harness PASS

productGoals.title: Supply-chain trust
productGoals.outcome: Supply-chain gates remain provably green across the fleet deploy substrate

productGoals.title: Operational deploy choreography
productGoals.outcome: Fleet integrators can rely on one coherent deploy and observability substrate for staged promotion
productGoals.measure: Demo walkthrough evidence and fleet health witnesses remain current

valueProposition.for: Operators and integrators consuming Fabric OS
valueProposition.who: need shippable outcomes traced to PRD and active milestone
valueProposition.that: Service fabric execution — DevOps, InfraOps, SecOps, fleet env, deploy choreography
valueProposition.unlike: Ad-hoc docs and sprint theater without product-goals trace
valueProposition.we: Fabric OS — DevOps, InfraOps, SecOps, fleet env, deploy choreography

competition.differentiation: Service fabric execution — DevOps, InfraOps, SecOps, fleet env, deploy choreography

gtmGoals.title: Integrator deploy substrate pilots
gtmGoals.outcome: GR-T2 pilots promote infrastructure with SecOps clearance evidence

shippingGoals.note: Assurance and delivery bars — not product or GTM goals.

goals.label: SecOps and ComplianceOps clearance
goals.target: internal clearance sealed and fleet compliance harness PASS

goals.label: PRD traceability
goals.target: 100% in-flight work traces to prdRef, capabilityId, or activeMilestone.id

activeMilestone.title: SECAS-S4-supply-chain
activeMilestone.shippableOutcome: SecOps internal Class R sealed; ComplianceOps harness PASS; vendor gates parallel only
